segments: : نَهَى رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ أَنْ يَطْرُقَ اَلرَّجُلُ أَهْلَهُ لَيْلاً إِذَا جَاءَ مِنَ اَلْغَيْبَةِ حَتَّى يُؤْذِنَهُمْ.
arabic.text: : نَهَى رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ أَنْ يَطْرُقَ اَلرَّجُلُ أَهْلَهُ لَيْلاً إِذَا جَاءَ مِنَ اَلْغَيْبَةِ حَتَّى يُؤْذِنَهُمْ.

segments:
Hadith.2514 - It is narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah al-Ansari, who said:
The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) forbade a man from entering upon his family at night when returning from a journey, until he informs them beforehand.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2514 - It is narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah al-Ansari, who said:
The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) forbade a man from entering upon his family at night when returning from a journey, until he informs them beforehand.

narratorChain.raw: 2514 - رُوِيَ عَنْ جَابِرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ اَلْأَنْصَارِيِّ قَالَ

segments: 2515 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «اَلسَّفَرُ قِطْعَةٌ مِنَ اَلْعَذَابِ فَإِذَا قَضَى أَحَدُكُمْ سَفَرَهُ فَلْيُسْرِعِ اَلْإِيَابَ إِلَى أَهْلِهِ.
arabic.text: 2515 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «اَلسَّفَرُ قِطْعَةٌ مِنَ اَلْعَذَابِ فَإِذَا قَضَى أَحَدُكُمْ سَفَرَهُ فَلْيُسْرِعِ اَلْإِيَابَ إِلَى أَهْلِهِ.

segments:
Hadith.2515 - Imam (as) said:
"Travel is a portion of torment, so when one of you has completed their journey, let them hasten to return to their family."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2515 - Imam (as) said:
"Travel is a portion of torment, so when one of you has completed their journey, let them hasten to return to their family."

segments: 2516 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «سَيْرُ اَلْمَنَازِلِ يُنْفِدُ اَلزَّادَ وَ يُسِيءُ اَلْأَخْلاَقَ وَ يُخْلِقُ اَلثِّيَابَ وَ اَلسَّيْرُ ثَمَانِيَةَ عَشَرَ ».
arabic.text: 2516 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «سَيْرُ اَلْمَنَازِلِ يُنْفِدُ اَلزَّادَ وَ يُسِيءُ اَلْأَخْلاَقَ وَ يُخْلِقُ اَلثِّيَابَ وَ اَلسَّيْرُ ثَمَانِيَةَ عَشَرَ ».

segments:
Hadith.2516 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Frequent travel depletes provisions, worsens manners, and wears out clothing. Travel is [ideally] for eighteen days."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2516 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Frequent travel depletes provisions, worsens manners, and wears out clothing. Travel is [ideally] for eighteen days."

segments: قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «إِذَا ضَلَلْتُمُ اَلطَّرِيقَ فَتَيَامَنُوا ».
arabic.text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «إِذَا ضَلَلْتُمُ اَلطَّرِيقَ فَتَيَامَنُوا ».

segments:
Hadith.2517 - Abdullah ibn Maymun narrated with his chain of transmission that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) said:
"If you lose your way, turn to the right."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2517 - Abdullah ibn Maymun narrated with his chain of transmission that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) said:
"If you lose your way, turn to the right."

narratorChain.raw: 2517 وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ مَيْمُونٍ بِإِسْنَادِهِ قَالَ

parts.text: 2517 وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ مَيْمُونٍ بِإِسْنَادِهِ قَالَ

segments: : «إِنَّ عَلَى ذِرْوَةِ كُلِّ جِسْرٍ شَيْطَاناً فَإِذَا اِنْتَهَيْتَ إِلَيْهِ فَقُلْ بِسْمِ اَللَّهِ يَرْحَلْ عَنْكَ.
arabic.text: : «إِنَّ عَلَى ذِرْوَةِ كُلِّ جِسْرٍ شَيْطَاناً فَإِذَا اِنْتَهَيْتَ إِلَيْهِ فَقُلْ بِسْمِ اَللَّهِ يَرْحَلْ عَنْكَ.

segments:
Hadith.2518 - Ja‘far ibn al-Qasim narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), who said:
"At the top of every bridge, there is a devil. When you reach it, say: 'In the name of Allah (swt),' and it will depart from you."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2518 - Ja‘far ibn al-Qasim narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), who said:
"At the top of every bridge, there is a devil. When you reach it, say: 'In the name of Allah (swt),' and it will depart from you."

narratorChain.raw: 2518 - وَ رَوَى جَعْفَرُ بْنُ اَلْقَاسِمِ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

segments: أَبُو اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ : «أَنَا ضَامِنٌ لِمَنْ خَرَجَ يُرِيدُ سَفَراً مُعْتَمّاً تَحْتَ حَنَكِهِ ثَلاَثاً أَلاَّ يُصِيبَهُ اَلسَّرَقُ وَ اَلْغَرَقُ وَ اَلْحَرَقُ ».
arabic.text: أَبُو اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ : «أَنَا ضَامِنٌ لِمَنْ خَرَجَ يُرِيدُ سَفَراً مُعْتَمّاً تَحْتَ حَنَكِهِ ثَلاَثاً أَلاَّ يُصِيبَهُ اَلسَّرَقُ وَ اَلْغَرَقُ وَ اَلْحَرَقُ ».

segments:
Hadith.2519 - Abu al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) said:
"I guarantee for anyone who sets out on a journey while wearing a turban wrapped under their chin three things: they will not encounter theft, drowning, or burning."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2519 - Abu al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) said:
"I guarantee for anyone who sets out on a journey while wearing a turban wrapped under their chin three things: they will not encounter theft, drowning, or burning."
